rules.rule_summary: Fences in a sight distance triangle cannot exceed 36 inches in height.
rules.verbatim_text: No fence or wall that exceeds a height of 36 inches from graded ground level shall be permitted within a sight distance triangle.

rules.rule_summary: Fences on a lot with one frontage cannot exceed 48 inches in height.
rules.verbatim_text: The maximum height for fences and walls shall be based on the following schedule: On a lot with only one (1) lot frontage: between the building line and the lot frontage; or... 48 inches

rules.rule_summary: Fences on a lot with multiple frontages cannot exceed 6 feet in height if not facing the principal entrance.
rules.verbatim_text: On a lot with more than one (1) lot frontage: between any building line on which the principal entrance to the building is not situated and the lot frontage which that building line faces 6 feet

rules.rule_summary: Fences in required side or rear yards cannot exceed 6 feet in height.
rules.verbatim_text: Any required side or rear yard 6 feet

rules.rule_summary: Fences in certain districts can be up to 8 or 10 feet high depending on the district.
rules.verbatim_text: D, ROS, CN, CG, CLS, INPUD, UF, UC Any required yard 8 feet
